exercises.name: WIDE DB RDL
exercises.description: Hinge at your hip. You don’t need to lock your knees out, but keep the leg straight and core tight.

exercises.name: Wide Grip DB Bent Over Row
exercises.description: Wide Grip DB Bent Over Row

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description:
1.Lean back holding a bar using a shoulder-width grip with your arms extended straight overhead.

2.Pull the bar down in front to the top of your chest, bending at the elbows.

3.Straighten your arms fully, returning the bar to the starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Pull Up
exercises.description:
1) Grab a pull up bar with an overhand grip, arms straightened, your body is hanging.

2) Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar. 

3) Once your lats have completely contracted at the top, lower your body returning to starting position.

4) Repeat.

exercises.name: Wide grip table pulls
exercises.description: Keep hands wider then shoulders. Bend knees , the closer your feet are to your body the easier these are to perform. If you want more resistance keep legs straight out in front of you.

exercises.name: Wide Stance Forward Fold
exercises.description: Stand with feet wide and hinge at the hips to fold forward, stretching your hamstrings and lower back.

exercises.name: Wide stance knee to elbows
exercises.description: Push up position with feet wider then hips (either side of mat) keep core tight. Alternate right knee to left elbow and left knee to right elbow

exercises.name: Wide V Pilates hold
exercises.description: Wide V ab hold (I like to call it the giving birth hold 🤣. ). Keep abs engaged. Hold your pee  and pull your tummy in NOT OUT. Hold

exercises.name: Wrist, Hand & Finger Stretching Routine - Active Isolated Stretching
exercises.description: Wrist, Hand & Finger Stretching Routine - Active Isolated Stretching

exercises.name: xx
exercises.description: If the bosu is too challenging you can do this exercise on the floor, or fold a mat and stand on that to create less stability.

exercises.name: Yoga - Boat Pose (Navasana)
exercises.description: Sit with knees bent, lift your feet off the floor, and extend your legs, keeping the spine straight. Hold your legs or extend arms parallel to the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Bound Angle Pose (Baddha Konasana)
exercises.description: Sit with feet together, knees bent out to the sides, and hold your feet with your hands, gently pressing your knees toward the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Bow Pose (Dhanurasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your stomach, grab your ankles, and lift your chest and legs off the floor, pulling your feet toward your head while opening the chest.

exercises.name: Yoga - Bridge Pose (Setu Bandhasana)
exercises.description: Lie on your back, bend your knees with feet flat on the floor, and lift your hips toward the ceiling, pressing your feet and arms into the ground.

exercises.name: Yoga - Camel Pose (Ustrasana)
exercises.description: Kneel with knees hip-width apart, press your hands onto your lower back, and lift your chest toward the ceiling while gently arching your back.

exercises.name: Yoga - Cat-Cow Stretch (Marjaryasana-Bitilasana)
exercises.description: Start on all fours, alternate between arching your back (Cat) and dipping your spine toward the mat (Cow), syncing movement with breath.

exercises.name: Yoga - Center Split
exercises.description: From a standing or seated position, slowly open your legs wide and lower your torso toward the floor, keeping the legs straight.

exercises.name: Yoga - Chair Pose (Utkatasana)
exercises.description: From standing, bend your knees deeply as if sitting in a chair, and extend your arms overhead, keeping weight in your heels.

exercises.name: Yoga - Chaturanga Dandasana
exercises.alternateName: push up, cobra, down dog flow
exercises.description: From Plank Pose, lower your body halfway to the floor, keeping your elbows close to your body and your core engaged.

exercises.name: Yoga - Child’s Pose (Balasana)
exercises.description: Start in a kneeling position, bring your big toes together, and sit back on your heels. Stretch your arms forward and lower your forehead to the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Cobra Pose (Bhujangasana)
exercises.description: Lie face down, press palms into the floor, and lift your chest by straightening your arms while keeping your elbows slightly bent.

exercises.name: Yoga - Cow Face Pose (Gomukhasana)
exercises.description: Sit with knees stacked on top of each other, one leg bent and the other crossed over, and reach arms behind to clasp hands.

exercises.name: Yoga - Crescent Lunge (Anjaneyasana)
exercises.description: Step one foot forward and bend the knee to 90 degrees, extending the other leg straight back and lifting your arms overhead with palms facing each other.

exercises.name: Yoga - Crow Pose (Bakasana)
exercises.description: Start in a squat, place your hands on the floor, and lift your hips high, balancing your knees on your upper arms as you engage your core.

exercises.name: Yoga - Crow to Chaturanga Flow
exercises.description: Start in Crow Pose, slowly transition into Chaturanga Dandasana by shifting forward and lowering the chest toward the floor.

exercises.name: Yoga - Dancer’s Pose (Natarajasana)
exercises.description: Stand on one leg, bend the other knee and grab the ankle, extending the opposite arm forward, while lifting the back leg behind you.

exercises.name: Yoga - Dancing Warrior Sequence
exercises.description: Flow from Warrior I to Warrior II, then extend the arms and bend backward into Reverse Warrior, and move into Wild Thing.
